page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the ecs.i2 family, running on a KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor operating at 2.5 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core, and a bundled 3839 GB local SSD storage volume. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear tradeoff between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core CPU performance is weak, ranking in the bottom 25% for stress-ng and the bottom 10% for Geekbench single-core and single-threaded compression tasks. However, multi-core execution scales to average levels, with stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression all placing in the middle 50%. Memory bandwidth tests for both small and large blocks also register in the average tier, though the overall Passmark memory score is weak.

From a resource density perspective, the server offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring substantial local storage capacity directly attached to dedicated compute resources. The inclusion of a 3839 GB SSD alongside 128.0 GB of RAM reduces the need for external block storage. This configuration is suitable for database operations, Redis caching, static web serving, and multi-threaded processing tasks that can leverage the 16 dedicated cores despite the lower single-core performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2.4xlarge is an x86_64 server within the ecs.i2 family, equipped with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, 128.0 GB of RAM, and a bundled 3839 GB local SSD. It operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Benchmark data reveals a performance tradeoff: single-core CPU execution and single-threaded compression are weak, ranking in the bottom 10% to 25%, whereas multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations consistently reach average tiers. This resource profile provides qualitative cost efficiency for storage-heavy deployments by combining high local SSD capacity with dedicated compute. It is suited for database operations, Redis caching, static web serving, and multi-threaded workloads.

tagline: A dedicated x86 server combining 128 GB RAM with a 3839 GB local SSD for storage-intensive multi-threaded workloads.

128.0 GB of RAM paired with a bundled 3839 GB local SSD
